items.title: Does Devon Energy’s (DVN) Cheaper, Longer Credit Line Quietly Reframe Its Balance Sheet Playbook?
items.summary: On March 24, 2026, Devon Energy Corporation amended its revolving credit facility, extending the maturity to March 24, 2031 and removing a 10 basis point SOFR credit spread adjustment, while renewing options for three additional one-year extensions subject to lender approval. This shift in borrowing terms modestly enhances Devon’s financial flexibility, potentially supporting its ability to sustain capital investment and balance sheet resilience through commodity cycles. items.title: Exxon Mobil Golden Pass LNG Startup And What It Might Mean For XOM
items.summary: Exxon Mobil's Golden Pass LNG facility, a joint venture with QatarEnergy, has reached first production.
